name: habit_tracker
html_template: SMTWTFS
css: #habit-widget { height:100%; display:flex; flex-direction:column; padding:1em; box-sizing:border-box; } #habit-widget .habit-header { font-size:clamp(1rem,6cqi,2rem); font-weight:700; color:var(--accent,#00ff41); margin-bottom:0.2em; letter-spacing:0.1em; } #habit-widget .habit-month { font-size:clamp(0.7rem,4cqi,1.1rem); color:var(--fg-dim,#888); margin-bottom:0.8em; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border,rgba(255,255,255,0.1)); padding-bottom:0.4em; } #habit-widget .habit-weekdays { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr); gap:2px; margin-bottom:4px; } #habit-widget .habit-weekdays span { text-align:center; font-size:clamp(0.5rem,2.8cqi,0.8rem); color:var(--fg-dim,#888); font-weight:700; } #habit-widget .habit-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr); gap:4px; flex:1; align-content:start; } #habit-widget .h-cell { aspect-ratio:1; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; border-radius:3px; font-size:clamp(0.55rem,3.2cqi,0.95rem); font-weight:600; border:1px solid var(--border,rgba(255,255,255,0.1)); } #habit-widget .h-done { background:var(--accent,#00ff41); color:#000; border-color:var(--accent,#00ff41); box-shadow:0 0 6px var(--accent,#00ff41); } #habit-widget .h-miss { background:rgba(255,50,50,0.12); color:rgba(255,80,80,0.7); border-color:rgba(255,50,50,0.25); } #habit-widget .h-future { background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03); color:var(--fg-dim,#888); opacity:0.5; } #habit-widget .h-empty { opacity:0; border:none; } #habit-widget .habit-streak { margin-top:0.6em; font-size:clamp(0.65rem,3.4cqi,1rem); color:var(--accent,#00ff41); opacity:0.7; text-align:right; border-top:1px solid var(--border,rgba(255,255,255,0.1)); padding-top:0.4em; }
